title: Yue Zhao
description: Zhao Yue is the Director of the Duke Kunshan University Development and Promotion Center.
text:
Yue Zhao
Yue Zhao
Director, Duke Kunshan University Development and Promotion Center, Kunshan Municipal People’s Government
Zhao Yue is the Director of the Duke Kunshan University Development and Promotion Center, overseeing its operations and activities. She started her career in March 2010 and holds a master’s degree.
03/2010—05/2013 Clerk, Kunshan Euro-Americas Investment Promoting Center
05/2013—03/2016 Deputy Director, Office of Kunshan Euro-Americas Investment Promoting Center
03/2016—01/2017 Deputy Chief of General Research Section, Development Research Center of Kunshan Municipal Government
01/2017—10/2017 Chief of Information Research Section, Development Research Center of Kunshan Municipal Government
10/2017—04/2020 Chief of General Coordination Section, Duke Kunshan University Affairs Coordination Office
04/2020—05/2021 Chief of General Coordination Section, Duke Kunshan University Development and Promotion Center
06/2021—06/2023 Deputy Director, Duke Kunshan University Development and Promotion Center
06/2023—present Director, Duke Kunshan University Development and Promotion Center
